mnemonics: P.R.R. (Precision, Recall, Rank) - The three core pillars of retrieval evaluation.
keyPoints: Precision measures the fraction of retrieved documents that are relevant.
Recall measures the fraction of relevant documents that are retrieved.
Mean Average Precision (MAP) provides a single-figure measure of quality across recall levels.
commonMistakes: Confusing Precision and Recall (Precision is 'How many of my results are good?', Recall is 'How many good results did I find?').
Using Precision or Recall in isolation instead of together or using a combined metric like F-measure.
